meta.name: Panary Admin Client Design System
meta.description: Design-Token- und Komponentenspezifikation des Panary Admin Panels. Abgeleitet aus der produktiven Angular-21-Implementierung. Kann als Referenz für beliebige Frontend-Frameworks verwendet werden.
meta.iconLibrary: Material Symbols Outlined via Google Fonts CDN

heightChain.comment: Stellt sicher, dass Router-Outlet-Kinder 100% Höhe einnehmen können

colors.comment: Alle Farben als Tailwind-Klassen-Paare [light, dark]. Inline-Styles nur für dynamische Icon-Farben.

kpiIconColors.comment: Direkte Inline-Style-Werte für Icon-Vordergrund und Hintergrund in KPI-Karten

patterns.sectionLabel: text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 dark:text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider
patterns.label: text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 dark:text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider
patterns.kpiLabel: text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400 dark:text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest

spacing.comment: Tailwind-Spacing-Skala (1 Einheit = 4px). Verwendete Werte in diesem Projekt:

usage.colorControl: via [style.color] binding (for dynamic colors) or Tailwind color class

navigationIcons.comment: Unicode-Sonderzeichen als Nav-Icons (kein Material Symbols für Nav)

darkMode.strategy: CSS-Klasse .dark auf dem html- oder body-Element

pattern.comment: Immer beide Varianten angeben: light zuerst, dark: als Modifier
pattern.example: bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 text-slate-900 dark:text-white border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-800

dialogEntrance.keyframe: @keyframes scale-in { from { transform: scale(0.95); opacity: 0; } to { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } }

saveButtonSuccess.keyframe: @keyframes save-success-pop { 0% { transform: scale(0.9); } 50% { transform: scale(1.05); } 100% { transform: scale(1); } }

appShell.description: Zweispaltiges Full-Screen-Layout: fixe Sidebar links, scrollbarer Main-Bereich rechts

sidebar.classes: w-60 bg-white dark:bg-gray-950 border-r border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-800 flex flex-col shrink-0

logo.subtitle: text-[10px] text-slate-400 dark:text-gray-600 mt-1.5 uppercase tracking-widest

nav.item: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-slate-900 dark:hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-900 transition

footer.logoutBtn: text-xs text-slate-400 dark:text-gray-600 hover:text-slate-900 dark:hover:text-white mt-1 transition

masterDetail.description: Tabellenzeile anklicken → Detail-Panel öffnet sich rechts, Tabellenspalte wird schmaler
masterDetail.listColumnCollapsed: w-72 shrink-0 border-r border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-800 overflow-y-auto transition-all
masterDetail.panelHeader: shrink-0 bg-slate-50 dark:bg-gray-950 border-b border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-800 px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center gap-2
masterDetail.navButton: text-slate-500 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-slate-900 dark:hover:text-white disabled:text-slate-300 dark:disabled:text-gray-700 disabled:cursor-not-allowed w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition text-sm
masterDetail.closeButton: text-slate-400 dark:text-gray-500 hover:text-slate-900 dark:hover:text-white w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition text-sm

breakpoints.usageNote: sm: für 2-Spalten-Grids, lg: für 3-Spalten-Grids. Kein md: oder xl: verwendet.

table.container: bg-white dark:bg-gray-900/50 border border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-800 rounded-xl overflow-hidden

thead.row: border-b border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-800 text-left text-slate-400 dark:text-gray-500 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

tbody.rowDefault: cursor-pointer border-b border-slate-200/50 dark:border-gray-800/50 transition hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-800/30 border-l-2 border-l-transparent

form.label: text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 dark:text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider

input.base: w-full bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 border rounded-lg p-3 text-slate-900 dark:text-white focus:ring-1 outline-none
input.default: border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-800 focus:border-slate-900 dark:focus:border-white focus:ring-slate-900 dark:focus:ring-white
input.combined: w-full bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-slate-900 dark:text-white focus:border-slate-900 dark:focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-slate-900 dark:focus:ring-white outline-none

form.select: w-full bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-slate-900 dark:text-white outline-none
form.errorBanner: bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-950/50 border border-red-200 dark:border-red-900/50 rounded-lg p-4 space-y-1
form.errorBannerItem: text-red-500 dark:text-red-400 text-sm flex items-start gap-2
form.sectionTitle: text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 dark:text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider

primary.class: bg-slate-900 dark:bg-white text-white dark:text-black font-bold px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs hover:bg-slate-800 dark:hover:bg-gray-200 transition

secondary.class: bg-slate-100 dark:bg-gray-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-800 text-slate-600 dark:text-gray-300 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm hover:bg-slate-200 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition

iconButton.class: w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-slate-500 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-slate-900 dark:hover:text-white hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition text-sm

saveButton.description: Dreistufige Mikro-Interaktion: Default → Saving (Spinner) → Success (Häkchen) → Reset

cssDefinition.comment: Vollständige CSS-Definition liegt in styles.css. Muss global eingebunden werden.

badge.role: text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full border border-slate-300 dark:border-gray-700 text-slate-600 dark:text-gray-300
badge.statusActive: text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full border bg-green-500/10 text-green-400 border-green-500/20
badge.statusDraft: text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full border bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-400 border-yellow-500/20
badge.statusArchived: text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full border bg-gray-500/10 text-gray-400 border-gray-500/20

statusPill.description: Größeres Status-Badge mit Farbpunkt und Icon, z.B. für Cloud-Verbindungsstatus
statusPill.base: flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold border transition-colors

variants.connected: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200 dark:bg-emerald-950 dark:text-emerald-400 dark:border-emerald-900
variants.pairing: bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200 dark:bg-amber-950 dark:text-amber-400 dark:border-amber-900
variants.disconnected: bg-slate-50 text-slate-600 border-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-900 dark:text-slate-400 dark:border-slate-700
variants.error: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border-red-200 dark:bg-red-950 dark:text-red-400 dark:border-red-900
variants.standalone: bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 border-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-800 dark:text-slate-300 dark:border-slate-700

kpiCard.container: bg-white dark:bg-gray-900/50 border border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-800 rounded-xl p-5 flex items-center gap-4 hover:border-slate-300 dark:hover:border-gray-700 transition-colors
kpiCard.iconComment: Hinter- und Vordergrundfarbe via [style.background-color] und [style.color] – nicht via Tailwind-Klassen (wegen JIT-Sicherheit)
kpiCard.label: text-xs font-semibold text-slate-400 dark:text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-widest
kpiCard.value: text-3xl font-bold mt-0.5 text-slate-900 dark:text-white tabular-nums

infoCard.container: bg-slate-50 dark:bg-gray-900/50 border border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4 text-sm
infoCard.label: text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 dark:text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider

dialog.backdrop: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/40 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm
dialog.container: bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-700 rounded-2xl p-6 max-w-sm w-full mx-4 shadow-2xl
dialog.title: text-base font-bold text-slate-900 dark:text-white

spinner.class: w-5 h-5 border-2 border-slate-300 dark:border-gray-600 border-t-slate-900 dark:border-t-white rounded-full animate-spin

themeToggle.container: flex items-center gap-1 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-gray-900 rounded-lg p-1
themeToggle.itemDefault: flex-1 text-xs py-1.5 rounded-md text-slate-500 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-slate-700 dark:hover:text-gray-300 transition
themeToggle.itemActive: flex-1 text-xs py-1.5 rounded-md bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 text-slate-900 dark:text-white shadow-sm font-medium transition

pairedCodeInput.class: w-full bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-800 rounded-xl p-4 text-slate-900 dark:text-white focus:border-slate-900 dark:focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-slate-900 dark:focus:ring-white outline-none font-mono text-2xl text-center tracking-[0.5em]

confirmDialog.description: Unsaved-Changes-Dialog mit drei Aktionen: Speichern, Verwerfen, Abbrechen

structure.backdrop: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/40 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm
structure.panel: bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-gray-700 rounded-2xl p-6 max-w-sm w-full mx-4 shadow-2xl
structure.title: text-base font-bold

structure: Linke Seite: Tabelle (entweder flex-1 oder w-72 falls Detail offen)
→ Header: p-6, flex items-center justify-between, h1 text-xl, + Neu Button
Rechte Seite (optional): Detail-Panel mit Navigations-Bar oben

formPage.description: Formular als eigenständige Seite oder als Panel

settingsPage.description: Einstellungsseite ohne Tabelle, z.B. Drucker, Cloud-Kopplung
settingsPage.title: text-xl font-bold tracking-tight

splitLayoutWithFixedDetail.description: Produktgruppen / Produkte: Tabelle links, erweitertes Detail-Panel rechts, beide mit eigenem Scroll

copyableCSS.comment: Komplette styles.css als Referenz für das Save-Button-Muster und globale Resets
copyableCSS.globalReset: html, body { height: 100%; margin: 0; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Switzer', sans-serif; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #0f172a; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }
copyableCSS.heightChain: app-root, app-admin-layout { display: block; height: 100%; } router-outlet + * { display: block; height: 100%; }

saveButton.container: .save-btn { position: relative; width: 160px; height: 48px; border: none; border-radius: 14px; cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), background-color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; }
saveButton.defaultState: .save-btn--default { background: #1e293b; color: #fff; } .save-btn--default:hover:not(:disabled) { background: #334155; } .dark .save-btn--default { background: #fff; color: #000; } .dark .save-btn--default:hover:not(:disabled) { background: #e5e5e5; }
saveButton.savingState: .save-btn--saving { background: #1e293b; color: #fff; pointer-events: none; } .dark .save-btn--saving { background: #fff; color: #000; }
saveButton.successState: .save-btn--success { background: #22c55e; color: #fff; pointer-events: none; animation: save-success-pop 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1); }
saveButton.content: .save-btn__content { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; height: 100%; transition: opacity 0.2s ease; }
saveButton.spinner: .save-spinner { width: 18px; height: 18px; border: 2.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-top-color: #fff; border-radius: 50%; animation: save-spin 0.6s linear infinite; } .dark .save-spinner { border: 2.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.15); border-top-color: #000; }
saveButton.checkmark: .save-checkmark { width: 22px; height: 22px; stroke: #fff; stroke-width: 3; fill: none; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-dasharray: 24; stroke-dashoffset: 24; animation: save-check-draw 0.4s 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.65,0,0.35,1) forwards; }
